title: Community Supported Agriculture * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Community Supported Agriculture * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FARMERS MARKET FUND COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF When an applicant purchases a CSA share, they are providing a farmer with the resources they need to grow food. In return, the farmer commits to giving the client a “share” of their crop, and receive the highest-quality, sustainably-grown food available, all season long. Recipients receive a weekly box of fresh produce during the growing season. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: SNAP recipients Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ZENGER FARM COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides members with a weekly box of farm fresh vegetables. 11741 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 4pm-6pm Email (503) 282-4245 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FARMERS MARKET FUND COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE ZENGER FARM COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE
